meaning: n.(尤指瑞士或意大利北部) 史前的湖上桩屋
examples: Hotel Palafitte also boasts a smoking room that offers a large selection of cigars. The well-ventilated space opens to lake.
This is an open – structure configuration, which aims to reduce 100% of the earth movements and avoid obstructing runoffs and the flows of living organisms with its palafitte support.
